name: Sweet Potato Souffle
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds sweet potatoes, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Boil potatoes in salted water until tender, about 30 minutes.
3. Mash and whip the potatoes.
4. Add sugar, eggs, raisins, lemon rind and juice, nutmeg, milk, pecans, butter, and coconut; mix well.
5. Pour mixture into a greased 9-13 inch casserole dish.
6. Bake for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and sprinkle the top with marshmallows.
8. Return to oven until marshmallows are brown, about 5 minutes.
